Open LLM Leaderboard v2, acc_norm (length-normalized accuracy) aggregated across 23 BBH subtasks. Same eval run as the IFEval/GPQA/MMLU-Pro entries added alongside this one.

BBH (Big Bench Hard) normalized accuracy = 0.29491 from the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard's lm-evaluation-harness run (dated 2025-03-07), the first fully independent (non-Alibaba) benchmark run found for this model -- all 10 existing results in the corpus entry are self-reported. Flagging explicitly: this is far below typical self-reported BBH figures (usually 80-90+ for models this capable) because the Open LLM Leaderboard v2 harness uses a strict 0-shot generative/regex-extraction methodology that penalizes reasoning models whose chain-of-thought output doesn't match the expected answer format -- not a sign of weak BBH capability. Not a forced fit: BBH is not already tracked anywhere in this entry (GPQA, MMLU-Pro, IFEval, and MATH also appear in the same leaderboard run but were skipped since those slugs are already present from self-reported sources).

HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v2 run for Qwen/QwQ-32B-Preview, BBH acc_norm = 0.666 -> 66.6. Confirmed via two separate direct fetches returning identical numbers.
